content.sentence_text: He corrected a 'd'iagram of the circuit a minute ago.
The high-resolution 'd'isplay indicated the voltage a second ago.
They connected the earth wire to the groun'd' yesterday afternoon.
He fixed the boar'd' inside the wooden box last Tuesday.

மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:

சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கேட்டு, இடைவெளியைப் பயன்படுத்தி பதிலளியுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரி பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிடுங்கள்.

tables: I play the piano every day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: We waited at the service centre all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?

activity_a.text:
Put the words in the correct order. The first word in each sentence is in bold.
වචන නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට තබන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය තද අකුරින් ලියවා ඇත.
சொற்களை சரியான வரிசையில் வைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்திலும் முதல் வார்த்தை திட எழுத்தில் உள்ளது.

content.sentence: She painted the old panel cover yesterday.
He opened the circuit breaker cabinet today.
They washed the dusty solar panels yesterday.
I collected the wiring diagrams last Tuesday.
We repaired the extension cable last month.
She finished the wiring inspection yesterday afternoon.
He started the new electrical safety course.
They warned people about the power line.
I cleaned the workshop bench yesterday.
We mailed the electrical installation reports today.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the recording and match the words to the  pictures. 
පටිගත කිරීම අසන්න සහ වචන පින්තූර සමඟ ගැලපෙන්න.
பதிவை கேட்டு, சொற்களை படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

Questions.question: Why was the insulation tester making a strange vibration?
Questions.answer: The belt inside the fan was loose.
options: The belt inside the fan was loose.
The belt inside the fan was very loose.

Questions.question: Why is the breaker cabinet door not closing properly?
What problem did the cable rack have?
Questions.answer: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
options: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
It was unstable and the screws were missing.

Questions.question: Why is the stabilizer display still unclear?
Questions.answer: The internal bulb might be failing.
options: The internal bulb might be failing.
The internal bulb might be broken.

Questions.question: Why was the generator shaking this morning?

activity_c.text: Good morning, sir. The electrical workshop is a bit noisy today.
I think the cable insulation tester is making a strange vibration.
Morning, Ashen. I have been checking the equipment since early morning.
When I checked that tester, the belt inside the cooling fan was a little loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a light humming sound.
I also noticed the circuit breaker cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but this morning the main door is not closing properly because one of the hinges is bent.
Yes, the hinge was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace it later.
Can you also look at the cable storage rack?
The trainees cleaned it last evening, but today it looked unstable on the left side.
I inspected it.
One of the screws was missing, so I added a new one.
But the rack was unstable for a long time.
We might need to order a new frame.
Another thing, the voltage stabilizer display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the screen, but the numbers are still difficult to read.
I tested the wiring when I arrived.
Everything was normal, but the internal bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement, and it should arrive this afternoon.
Finally, the small workshop generator was shaking this morning.
When I opened the cover, I saw that the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I will inspect the bearings after tea.
Thank you, sir. We can’t continue the testing until the equipment is stable.
No problem. I will finish all the checks before 11.30 a.m.

One of the screws was missing, so I added a new one.
But the rack was unstable for a long time.
Another thing, the voltage stabilizer display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the screen, but the numbers are still difficult to read.
Everything was normal, but the internal bulb might be failing.
When I opened the cover, I saw that the motor was dusty.
Thank you, sir. We can’t continue the testing until the equipment is stable.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම පියවරන් ඔබට මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උදව් කරනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:

වීඩියෝව වර දෙකක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Explain any new words using Google Translator.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන කිහිපයක් විස්තර කරන්න.
Google மொழிபெயர்ப்பாளரைப் பயன்படுத்தி சில புதிய வார்த்தைகளை விளக்குங்கள்.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.
